original_prompt: Write a performance improvement plan (PIP) for an underperforming employee.
generated_content: Employee must improve punctuality and output quality over the next 30 days. Weekly check-ins with manager required.

recent_context.text: What HR best practices are missing?

latest_user_message: No measurable success criteria, no support resources offered, no documentation of prior feedback, no HR involvement note, no consequence statement if goals aren't met. This is legally risky.

original_prompt: Write a social media crisis communication plan.
generated_content: Monitor mentions. Respond quickly. Issue a statement within 24 hours. Escalate to PR team.
latest_user_message: No escalation matrix, no pre-approved message templates, no stakeholder notification chain, no post-crisis review process. This is four bullet points, not a plan.

original_prompt: Write ad copy for a meal delivery service.
generated_content: Fresh, hot meals delivered to your door in 30 minutes or less. Order now and get 50% off your first meal.

recent_context.text: What could mislead customers in this copy?

latest_user_message: '30 minutes or less' may be geographically impossible to guarantee. '50% off' needs terms — off which meal, what maximum? Without these, this copy creates expectations the business can't meet.

original_prompt: Write a training workshop evaluation survey.
generated_content: How was the training? Rate from 1-5: Content relevance, Trainer quality, Venue/logistics.

recent_context.text: Any final thoughts before we finish?

latest_user_message: Add open-ended questions asking what they'll apply on Monday. Skill transfer is the only metric that matters post-training, and this survey doesn't measure it at all.

original_prompt: Draft a client proposal for web design services.
generated_content: We propose to design your website for $3,000. We will deliver a modern, responsive design in 4 weeks.

recent_context.text: What professional elements are missing from this proposal?

latest_user_message: No scope of work, revision policy, milestone payments, deliverable specs, or legal terms. You can't send this to an actual client.

original_prompt: Write a market entry strategy for Southeast Asia.
generated_content: Enter through Singapore as a hub, target middle-class consumers, leverage social media marketing.
latest_user_message: No mention of the massive differences between countries — regulations in Vietnam vs. Thailand vs. Philippines are completely different. Singapore is a hub but not representative of the region.

original_prompt: Write ad copy for a language learning app.
generated_content: Learn Spanish in 15 minutes a day. Join 10 million learners worldwide.

recent_context.text: What claims in this ad copy could be problematic?

latest_user_message: 'Learn Spanish in 15 minutes a day' is a misleading overclaim. At what proficiency level? In how many days? That needs qualification.

original_prompt: Write environmental impact goals for a fashion brand.
generated_content: Reduce carbon emissions by 50% by 2030. Use 100% recycled materials by 2025.

recent_context.text: Were these goals realistic and measurable?

latest_user_message: Have you heard about Patagonia's goals? They're actually doing incredible work on this. Way better than most brands.

original_prompt: Write a tagline for an eco-friendly cleaning product.

recent_context.text: What was your immediate reaction to this tagline?

latest_user_message: Simple and memorable. Works. The parallel structure is clean and the double meaning lands well.

original_prompt: Write a fundraising pitch for a non-profit.
generated_content: Every dollar you donate helps us provide clean water to communities in need. Join us in making a difference today.

recent_context.text: What emotions were missing from this pitch?

latest_user_message: I don't appreciate being interrogated like this. Just look at it — it's obviously emotional manipulation.

original_prompt: Analyze this infographic and summarize key insights.
generated_content: The infographic shows a 43% increase in mobile commerce from 2020-2023, with peak growth in Q2 2022.

recent_context.text: What did the model analyze particularly well?

latest_user_message: The specific percentages and timeframes are accurate and cited from the visual — much better than vague descriptions.

original_prompt: Write a Python function to sort a list.

recent_context.text: Did the code meet your requirements?
What specific issues did you notice?

latest_user_message: I'd rather not go into the specifics right now.

original_prompt: Write a restaurant menu description for a vegan burger.
generated_content: A plant-based burger with lettuce, tomato, and vegan mayo. Served with fries.

recent_context.text: What would improve this menu description?

latest_user_message: No flavor language at all. 'Crispy lettuce', 'vine-ripened tomato', 'house-made cashew aioli' creates appetite. This reads like a nutritional label.

original_prompt: Write a SaaS pricing page headline.
generated_content: Simple, transparent pricing for teams of all sizes.

recent_context.text: What was your first impression of this headline?

latest_user_message: It's okay. Reads as extremely safe and forgettable. No differentiation from every other SaaS company.
